overall.description: A high-fidelity game engine render showing a static view of a gothic library interior centered on a stone fireplace. The scene features ornate arched windows with diamond-patterned glass, leather furniture, and realistic fire animation, creating a cozy medieval atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic library reading room with central fireplace

entered.detail: large circular stone fireplace with burning fire and carved wooden mantle structure

tall arched window with diamond-patterned leaded glass allowing natural light
tall arched window with diamond-patterned leaded glass allowing natural light
blue and gold patterned circular rug on the stone floor

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a grand gothic library interior centered on a large stone fireplace with animated flames. The room features ornate arched windows with diamond-patterned glass on both sides, a leather armchair and side table to the right, and an ornate rug to the left. Natural daylight mixes with the warm firelight, creating a cozy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, static perspective of a grand gothic library, emphasizing the interplay between natural daylight and warm firelight. It begins centered on a large stone fireplace where animated flames flicker, casting a cozy glow across the room. The view encompasses ornate arched windows with diamond-patterned glass on both sides, framing the interior in soft light. To the right, a leather armchair and side table sit quietly, while an ornate rug anchors the space to the left. The scene remains poised and still, allowing the subtle movement of the fire to define the atmosphere.
